requirement_topic.en: ZESCO Grid Connection — 230 V / 50 Hz, Load-Shedding Context, and Connection Approval
requirement_topic.zh: ZESCO并网接入——230 V / 50 Hz、限电背景及接入批准
requirement_topic.zht: ZESCO併網接入——230 V / 50 Hz、限電背景及接入批准

summary.en: Zambia's national grid, operated by ZESCO (Zambia Electricity Supply Corporation), operates at 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz, consistent with the IEC standard voltage. ZESCO regulates grid-connection approvals for new electrical loads, including EV charging installations. Any charger drawing supply from the national grid requires ZESCO connection approval, load assessment, metering, and compliance with ZESCO's network code and connection procedures. Critically, Zambia has experienced severe and prolonged load-shedding — power outages of 8–12 hours per day or more during drought periods affecting hydropower generation — which is a real operational constraint for EV charging deployment. Exporters and project developers must account for grid-reliability limitations in charger design and siting strategy: features such as a wide input-voltage and frequency tolerance, surge protection, battery energy storage buffer, or off-grid / solar-hybrid capability are practically important in the Zambia context. ERB (Energy Regulation Board) is the sector regulator and licenses electricity supply and distribution activities. Power-quality requirements align with IEC 61000 series.
summary.zh: 赞比亚国家电网由ZESCO（赞比亚供电公司）运营，采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，符合IEC标准电压。ZESCO负责新增电气负荷（包括电动汽车充电设施）的并网接入审批。任何接入国家电网的充电桩均需取得ZESCO并网批准、负荷评估、计量，并符合ZESCO的电网规程和接入程序。值得特别注意的是，赞比亚曾经历严重且长期的限电——旱期水电发电受影响时，每日停电时间可达8至12小时甚至更长——这是电动汽车充电部署的真实运营约束。出口商和项目开发者在充电桩设计和选址策略中必须充分考虑电网可靠性限制：宽输入电压和频率容差、浪涌保护、储能缓冲，或离网/光伏混合能力，在赞比亚环境下具有重要实际意义。ERB（能源监管委员会）是行业监管机构，负责颁发电力供应和配电活动许可证。电能质量要求符合IEC 61000系列。
summary.zht: 尚比亞國家電網由ZESCO（尚比亞供電公司）運營，採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，符合IEC標準電壓。ZESCO負責新增電氣負荷（包括電動汽車充電設施）的併網接入審批。任何接入國家電網的充電樁均需取得ZESCO併網批准、負荷評估、計量，並符合ZESCO的電網規程和接入程序。值得特別注意的是，尚比亞曾經歷嚴重且長期的限電——旱期水電發電受影響時，每日停電時間可達8至12小時甚至更長——這是電動汽車充電部署的真實運營約束。出口商和項目開發者在充電樁設計和選址策略中必須充分考慮電網可靠性限制：寬輸入電壓和頻率容差、浪湧保護、儲能緩衝，或離網/光伏混合能力，在尚比亞環境下具有重要實際意義。ERB（能源監管委員會）是行業監管機構，負責頒發電力供應和配電活動許可證。電能質量要求符合IEC 61000系列。

standards_or_laws: ZESCO Grid Code and network connection procedures (zesco.co.zm)
ERB (Energy Regulation Board) licensing requirements for electricity supply activities (erb.org.zm)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1:2017 — voltage and frequency compatibility for EV supply equipment
Zambia Electricity Act (as administered by ERB)

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Zambia's 230 V / 400 V supply is nominally close but not identical, requiring confirmation of input-voltage range and compliance with ZESCO connection procedures. China domestic GB/T charger evidence does not satisfy ZESCO connection approval or ERB licensing requirements.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。赞比亚230 V / 400 V供电名义上接近但并不完全相同，须确认输入电压范围并符合ZESCO接入程序。中国国内GB/T充电桩证据不能满足ZESCO并网批准或ERB许可要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。尚比亞230 V / 400 V供電名義上接近但並不完全相同，須確認輸入電壓範圍並符合ZESCO接入程序。中國國內GB/T充電樁證據不能滿足ZESCO併網批准或ERB許可要求。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) input-voltage range of the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) the charger design accounts for Zambia's grid-reliability environment — wide input-voltage tolerance, surge and brownout protection, and consideration of battery buffer or solar-hybrid options for locations subject to load-shedding; (3) ZESCO grid-connection approval is obtained for the specific installation, including load assessment and metering; (4) ERB licensing obligations for the intended supply activity are satisfied; (5) power-quality and harmonic data meet IEC 61000 requirements. China domestic 220 V / 380 V design evidence without voltage-range confirmation and without ZESCO / ERB approval is not grid-ready for Zambia.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入电压范围覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 充电桩设计充分考虑赞比亚电网可靠性环境——宽输入电压容差、浪涌和欠压保护，以及在限电地区考虑储能缓冲或光伏混合方案；(3) 针对具体安装取得ZESCO并网批准，包括负荷评估和计量；(4) 满足预期供电活动的ERB许可义务；(5) 电能质量和谐波数据符合IEC 61000要求。未确认电压范围且未取得ZESCO / ERB批准的中国国内220 V / 380 V设计证据，不满足赞比亚并网要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入電壓範圍覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 充電樁設計充分考慮尚比亞電網可靠性環境——寬輸入電壓容差、浪湧和欠壓保護，以及在限電地區考慮儲能緩衝或光伏混合方案；(3) 針對具體安裝取得ZESCO併網批准，包括負荷評估和計量；(4) 滿足預期供電活動的ERB許可義務；(5) 電能質量和諧波數據符合IEC 61000要求。未確認電壓範圍且未取得ZESCO / ERB批准的中國國內220 V / 380 V設計證據，不滿足尚比亞併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ZESCO grid-connection approval is required for any grid-connected charger installation; ERB licensing governs electricity supply activities; grid-reliability constraints require design adaptation beyond standard voltage compliance
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a ZESCO / ERB approval substitute; voltage, surge, and thermal ratings must be re-confirmed for Zambia grid conditions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Zambia-ready charger must cover 230 V / 400 V grid input, withstand load-shedding voltage and surge conditions, obtain ZESCO connection approval and ERB licensing clearance, and include IEC-based power-quality evidence. China GB/T domestic design evidence alone does not meet these requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向赞比亚的充电桩须覆盖230 V / 400 V电网输入、承受限电电压波动及浪涌条件、取得ZESCO并网批准和ERB许可许可，并提供基于IEC的电能质量证据。仅凭中国GB/T国内设计证据无法满足上述要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向尚比亞的充電樁須覆蓋230 V / 400 V電網輸入、承受限電電壓波動及浪湧條件、取得ZESCO併網批准和ERB許可，並提供基於IEC的電能質量證據。僅憑中國GB/T國內設計證據無法滿足上述要求。
